title: oberonia pygmaea
intro: Oberonia pygmaea, also known as the Dwarf Spider Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where its rhizomes are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Oberonia pygmaea include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Oberonia pygmaea can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction by boiling its rhizomes in water, and it is also used in traditional remedies in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
